title: Elon Musk says Tesla’s ‘Terafab’ AI chip manufacturing project to launch next week
snippet: With the Terafab initiative, Tesla could eventually transform itself into an integrated device manufacturer (IDM) — designing and producing its own semiconductors.

title: India's NavIC satellite system faces challenge as IRNSS-1F failed after atomic clock malfunction: what we know
snippet: India's NavIC GPS alternative faces challenges after satellite IRNSS-1F failed, reducing operational satellites to three. A minimum of four is needed for complete coverage. The Union government last year stated that only four of the 11 satellites deployed for the NavIC system were fully operational.

title: xAI hiring reset: Elon Musk apologises to AI talent overlooked during early hiring, promises overhaul
snippet: Elon Musk said he will restructure xAI to improve talent acquisition, acknowledging past hiring mistakes.

title: Meta reportedly delays rollout of new AI model Avocado – here's why
snippet: The delayed timeline comes even as the company invests heavily to expand its AI ambitions, including a roadmap for building its own chips.

title: Starting office work? These beginner-friendly laptops make daily tasks easier
snippet: New to office work or buying your first work laptop? These beginner-friendly office laptops focus on smooth performance, reliable battery life, and practical features.

title: Elon Musk's warning as Amazon probes AI-linked outages: ‘Proceed with caution’
snippet: Elon Musk's comment came after a post from cybersecurity consultant Lukasz Olejnik. The cybersecurity consultant had said, ‘Amazon is holding a mandatory meeting about AI breaking its systems.’

title: WhatsApp launches parent managed account feature: How it works, how to use and more
snippet: WhatsApp is launching 'parent-managed accounts' for pre-teens, allowing parents to control their children's interactions while ensuring privacy through end-to-end encryption. The setup requires both devices to link accounts, and a Parent PIN secures privacy settings.

title: Karnataka constitutes committee on responsible AI to develop comprehensive framework
snippet: Karnataka constitutes committee on responsible AI to develop comprehensive framework

title: iQOO Z11x with 7,200 mAh battery and Dimensity 7400 SoC launched in India, price starts at  ₹18,999
snippet: iQOO has launched the Z11x 5G in India, featuring a 7200mAh battery, dual rear cameras, and a 6.76-inch Full HD+ display. Prices start at  ₹18,999, offering models with up to 256GB storage, and the device supports military-grade durability and 4K video recording.

title: Adobe adds AI assistant to Photoshop, upgrades Firefly with new generative tools
snippet: Adobe is launching a beta AI assistant for Photoshop on web and mobile, allowing paid users unlimited generations until April 9. The assistant simplifies editing tasks through voice or text commands, while Firefly Image Editor receives updates for improved image manipulation.

title: When your Apple watch becomes an office taskmaster
snippet: White-collar workers increasingly track heart rate variability (HRV) with wearables to boost health and workplace performance. The trend has created HRV coaching and biohacking industries, though experts warn the obsession may be misleading, unhealthy, or anxiety-inducing.

title: ByteDance suspends launch of video AI model after copyright disputes: Report

title: Karnataka dairy cooperative Bamul files complaint against Flipkart’s Rs 1 milk offer
snippet: The Bangalore Cooperative Milk Union Ltd (Bamul) has filed a complaint with the Competition Commission of India under Section 19(1)(a) against Flipkart’s campaign, he said, adding that he has written to Prime Minister Narendra Modi seeking intervention.

title: Jurors mull evidence in social media addiction trial against Meta, YouTube
snippet: Jurors will return to court in Los Angeles Monday to resume deliberations in a landmark social media addiction trial accusing Meta and YouTube of trying to hook young internet users. The lawsuit is one of hundreds accusing social media firms of luring young users to become addicted to their content

title: Win for Amazon as Luxembourg court scraps record $854 million privacy fine
snippet: The Luxembourg ‌National Commission ⁠for Data ⁠Protection (CNPD) penalised Amazon in 2021 over its online behavioural advertising ​practices, saying its processing of users' personal data breached EU privacy rules ​known as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

title: Robot Phone is here: Honor unveils prototype with AI features at Mobile World Congress
snippet: The robot phone is now in the test phase. Commercial launch in China is expected in the second half of the year. At the event, Honor also showcased a humanoid robot designed for tasks such as shopping assistance, workplace inspections, and companionship.
